blocker: The saved `phase11-safe-grinder` browser/app state did not resume the authoritative Week 10 checkpoint. Reopening the named session on 2026-03-20 landed on fresh onboarding (`CYCLE 1`, `START THE RUN`) with empty localStorage and sessionStorage, so Week 11 could not be continued without a human restore-or-replay decision.

slice_policy.default_goal: Advance exactly one completed in-game week for the active persona unless a major blocker or especially high-signal audit event happens first.
slice_policy.detail_log_policy: Write one canonical per-slice detail file per completed week and keep the progress report concise.

next_slice: Human decision needed: either restore the authoritative Persona A Week 10 browser/app checkpoint (`₡1188 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 60% / Sanity 20%`, no active conditions) for `phase11-safe-grinder`, or explicitly authorize another replay from onboarding back to that checkpoint before resuming Week 11.

last_run.summary: A fresh-context slice tried to resume Persona A from the saved authoritative Week 10 summary, but the `phase11-safe-grinder` session reopened on fresh onboarding (`CYCLE 1`, `START THE RUN`) instead of the checkpoint. `document.body.innerText` and a screenshot were captured before any clicks, and both localStorage and sessionStorage were empty, so no authoritative Week 11 continuation was possible.
